bash meta-tests/run.sh exits 0. All 111 tests pass (28 hook tests + 83 prior sprint tests). No regressions.
grep -c '@test ' test-hooks.bats returns 28, which is >= 20. Tests cover: on-generator-stop (9 tests), on-evaluator-stop (12 tests), on-stop (7 tests).

All tests use $HARNESS_STATE relative to TEST_TEMP_DIR. setup() does cd $TEST_TEMP_DIR. Hooks use HARNESS_STATE='harness-state' (relative to cwd). Only reference to 'harness-state' in test file is a comment. No test touches real project directory.
All 28 @test names follow convention: 9 prefixed 'on-generator-stop:', 12 prefixed 'on-evaluator-stop:', 7 prefixed 'on-stop:'. Each has descriptive behavior suffix.

All 13 tests asserting exit 2 also verify $output contains relevant substring: 'not ready-for-eval or blocked', 'generator-log.md', 'eval-report.json', 'overallResult', 'criteriaResults', 'criteria', 'contract-review.json', 'decision', 'still active', 'still negotiating', 'ready for evaluation'.

regression.method: Full meta-tests suite via 'bash meta-tests/run.sh': all 111 tests pass (exit 0). Covers test-infrastructure.bats (sprint 1), test-utils-pure.bats (sprint 2), test-utils-state.bats (sprint 3), test-git.bats (sprint 4), and test-hooks.bats (sprint 5).

summary: All 30 criteria PASS. 28 hook validation tests cover all 3 hooks across allow and block scenarios. Tests are well-isolated in temp directories, follow naming conventions, and verify both exit codes and error messages. Full regression suite (111 tests across sprints 1-4) passes with zero failures.
